author: Kenning
text:
Thread diffless before/after tip facts to post (§13)

Engine::diffless reads the operating tip before pre and after it, threading those as the §13 previous_commit/commit facts to post (and any post-phase rollback), mirroring the seal path's handoff. Diffless authors no §5 message, so the facts are metadata-less: Sealed/SealRecord.message and SealFacts.metadata become Option, and the wire omits metadata while still carrying the commit pair. No shipped plugin reads them yet; a future sync/post cache-rebuild participant will.
